turns.user_message: My friend made a joke about me being the quiet one in the group. I guess I don't really have much to add anyway.
I keep thinking about that comment and how it's probably true. I feel like I'm just fading into the background everywhere I go.
It feels like people only notice me when I'm not there, and even then it doesn't matter. I'm starting to believe I'm just not a person worth noticing.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did. This just started recently.
